conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt most connected to J, as our conversation flowed naturally into forming a pact to share strategies and support each other, which made me feel like we were on the same team. I also connected well with G, since we delved deeply into building trust and testing alliances through honest discussions, aligning with my own cautious approach. Additionally, I felt a strong bond with A after sharing heartfelt stories about our families' needs, which created a sense of mutual understanding. In contrast, I felt least connected to C, as our chat stayed mostly on light topics like travel dreams without much depth on game strategies.

I did make an agreement with J to share tips and back each other up without double-crossing, which felt straightforward and reliable. Going into the game, I trust J based on that pact, but I don't specifically distrust anyone else yet, though I'll remain cautious with all partners as we proceed.
